title: Trianaeopiper filistilum
taxonomy: Trianaeopiper filistilum is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae, commonly known as the pepper family. This plant belongs to the genus Trianaeopiper, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Piper. The family Piperaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, including many species of pepper and its relatives. The classification of Trianaeopiper filistilum is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. The plant is native to the tropical regions of South America.
